item.description: - Improved edit reliability for tab-indented files - Respect CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR everywhere - Reduced unnecessary tool permission prompts - Added support for symlinks in @file typeahead - Bugfixes, UI polish, and tool reliability improvements

item.title: Claude Code 1.0.4
item.description: - Fixed a bug where MCP tool errors weren't being parsed correctly

item.title: Claude Code 1.0.1
item.description: - Added `DISABLE_INTERLEAVED_THINKING` to give users the option to opt out of interleaved thinking. - Improved model references to show provider-specific names (Sonnet 3.7 for Bedrock, Sonnet 4 for Console) - Updated documentation links and OAuth process descriptions

item.title: Claude Code 1.0.0
item.description: - Claude Code is now generally available - Introducing Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 models

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.125
item.description: - Breaking change: Bedrock ARN passed to `ANTHROPIC_MODEL` or `ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL` should no longer contain an escaped slash (specify `/` instead of `%2F`) - Removed `DEBUG=true` in favor of `ANTHROPIC_LOG=debug`, to log all requests

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.117
item.description: - Breaking change: --print JSON output now returns nested message objects, for forwards-compatibility as we introduce new metadata fields - Introduced settings.cleanupPeriodDays - Introduced CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_HELPER_TTL_MS env var - Introduced --debug mode

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.108
item.description: - You can now send messages to Claude while it works to steer Claude in real-time - Introduced BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS and BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS env vars - Fixed a bug where thinking was not working in -p mode - Fixed a regression in /cost reporting - Deprecated MCP wizard interface in favor of other MCP commands

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.107
item.description: - CLAUDE.md files can now import other files. Add @path/to/file.md to ./CLAUDE.md to load additional files on launch

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.106
item.description: - MCP SSE server configs can now specify custom headers - Fixed a bug where MCP permission prompt didn't always show correctly

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.105
item.description: - Claude can now search the web - Moved system & account status to /status - Added word movement keybindings for Vim - Improved latency for startup, todo tool, and file edits

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.102
item.description: - Improved thinking triggering reliability - Improved @mention reliability for images and folders - You can now paste multiple large chunks into one prompt

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.100
item.description: - Fixed a crash caused by a stack overflow error - Made db storage optional; missing db support disables --continue and --resume

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.98
item.description: - Fixed an issue where auto-compact was running twice

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.96
item.description: - Claude Code can now also be used with a Claude Max subscription (https://claude.ai/upgrade)

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.93
item.description: - Resume conversations from where you left off from with "claude --continue" and "claude --resume" - Claude now has access to a Todo list that helps it stay on track and be more organized

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.82
item.description: - Added support for --disallowedTools - Renamed tools for consistency: LSTool -> LS, View -> Read, etc.

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.75
item.description: - Hit Enter to queue up additional messages while Claude is working - Drag in or copy/paste image files directly into the prompt - @-mention files to directly add them to context - Run one-off MCP servers with `claude --mcp-config <path-to-file>` - Improved performance for filename auto-complete

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.74
item.description: - Added support for refreshing dynamically generated API keys (via apiKeyHelper), with a 5 minute TTL - Task tool can now perform writes and run bash commands

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.72
item.description: - Updated spinner to indicate tokens loaded and tool usage

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.70
item.description: - Network commands like curl are now available for Claude to use - Claude can now run multiple web queries in parallel - Pressing ESC once immediately interrupts Claude in Auto-accept mode

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.69
item.description: - Fixed UI glitches with improved Select component behavior - Enhanced terminal output display with better text truncation logic

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.67
item.description: - Shared project permission rules can be saved in .claude/settings.json

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.66
item.description: - Print mode (-p) now supports streaming output via --output-format=stream-json - Fixed issue where pasting could trigger memory or bash mode unexpectedly

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.63
item.description: - Fixed an issue where MCP tools were loaded twice, which caused tool call errors

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.61
item.description: - Navigate menus with vim-style keys (j/k) or bash/emacs shortcuts (Ctrl+n/p) for faster interaction - Enhanced image detection for more reliable clipboard paste functionality - Fixed an issue where ESC key could crash the conversation history selector

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.59
item.description: - Copy+paste images directly into your prompt - Improved progress indicators for bash and fetch tools - Bugfixes for non-interactive mode (-p)

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.54
item.description: - Quickly add to Memory by starting your message with '#' - Press ctrl+r to see full output for long tool results - Added support for MCP SSE transport

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.53
item.description: - New web fetch tool lets Claude view URLs that you paste in - Fixed a bug with JPEG detection

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.50
item.description: - New MCP "project" scope now allows you to add MCP servers to .mcp.json files and commit them to your repository

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.49
item.description: - Previous MCP server scopes have been renamed: previous "project" scope is now "local" and "global" scope is now "user"

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.47
item.description: - Press Tab to auto-complete file and folder names - Press Shift + Tab to toggle auto-accept for file edits - Automatic conversation compaction for infinite conversation length (toggle with /config)

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.44
item.description: - Ask Claude to make a plan with thinking mode: just say 'think' or 'think harder' or even 'ultrathink'

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.41
item.description: - MCP server startup timeout can now be configured via MCP_TIMEOUT environment variable - MCP server startup no longer blocks the app from starting up

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.37
item.description: - New /release-notes command lets you view release notes at any time - `claude config add/remove` commands now accept multiple values separated by commas or spaces

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.36
item.description: - Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop with `claude mcp add-from-claude-desktop` - Add MCP servers as JSON strings with `claude mcp add-json <n> <json>`

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.34
item.description: - Vim bindings for text input - enable with /vim or /config

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.32
item.description: - Interactive MCP setup wizard: Run "claude mcp add" to add MCP servers with a step-by-step interface - Fix for some PersistentShell issues

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.31
item.description: - Custom slash commands: Markdown files in .claude/commands/ directories now appear as custom slash commands to insert prompts into your conversation - MCP debug mode: Run with --mcp-debug flag to get more information about MCP server errors

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.30
item.description: - Added ANSI color theme for better terminal compatibility - Fixed issue where slash command arguments weren't being sent properly - (Mac-only) API keys are now stored in macOS Keychain

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.26
item.description: - New /approved-tools command for managing tool permissions - Word-level diff display for improved code readability - Fuzzy matching for slash commands

item.title: Claude Code 0.2.21
item.description: - Fuzzy matching for /commands
